metadata.description: Citation completeness verification of NHB2026 manuscript - checking all .tex citation keys against references.bib entries

summary: Citation completeness audit of NHB2026 manuscript. Result: PERFECT MATCH. 28 unique citation keys used in .tex files, 28 bib entries in references.bib. Zero missing citations, zero orphaned bib entries. Manuscript is citation-complete and ready for submission.

annotation.content: Citation completeness audit of NHB2026 manuscript. Read all 5 section .tex files (introduction, methods, results, discussion, supplementary), abstract.tex, main.tex, arxiv/main.tex, and references.bib. Extracted all citation keys from \citep{}, \citet{}, \citeauthor{}, \citeyearpar{} commands and all @type{key,...} entries from references.bib.
